prompt: Create a fine-art photographic portrait titled The Lady of Red Poppies: a pale, androgynous woman with a short blunt white bob haircut stands in a misty poppy field, wearing a structured high-collared white blouse. Her face is deliberately hidden by a centered matte square block in muted taupe, giving the image an anonymous surreal editorial quality. Around and above her head are exactly 7 vivid red poppy blossoms: one large poppy centered over the forehead, two large poppies rising behind the crown, one poppy at the left side of the head, one poppy at the right side, one smaller red poppy partially visible near the right cheek area, and one lower right poppy among dried stems. Include thin dried wildflower stems and seed heads crossing the foreground and framing the portrait. Use a muted gray-green foggy background with soft red poppies blurred in the distance, shallow depth of field, natural diffused overcast light, subdued earthy tones contrasted with intense crimson petals, cinematic vertical composition, elegant melancholy mood, hyperrealistic texture in the papery poppy petals and white hair, 3:4 aspect ratio.
